chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.10 of 2024 Syed Haris Hassan Versus Muhammad Irfan Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection/reply “A” 2. For orders on CMA 152/24 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA 153/24 Dated: 28.02.2024 None present. -.-.- Appellant and his counsel are called absent. Even on the last date no was in attendance on behalf of the appellant. The office has raised certain objections, which also have not have been complied as yet. There is no intimation either. It seems that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Instant First Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
